movies.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.
movies.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2

movies.overview: Lucero’s life appears immaculate: a wealthy household, a devoted husband, and two children who embody the promise of a perfect family. Yet beneath this surface simmers a quiet dissatisfaction. When Matías, a young swimming coach hired by her husband, enters their lives, Lucero finds herself pulled into a risky and consuming relationship. As secrecy, desire, and jealousy tighten their grip, the boundaries within the family begin to collapse, placing mother and daughter in a dangerous emotional triangle that threatens to shatter everything Lucero has built.
movies.title: Desire

movies.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.
movies.tagline: Discover the making of a king.
movies.title: Michael

movies.overview: The "Supreme Invincible Cup" is about to begin, and a host of top teams are about to engage in an unprecedented showdown! But the Kung Fu Women's Soccer Team has been dealt a hellish script right from the start?! Their opponents are all highly skilled, and external pressure is mounting. The schemes on the field are one after another... Can they use their kung fu to turn the tide on the green field?

production_companies.name: Shanghai Maoyan Film 上海猫眼影业

movies.tagline: One kick can ignite the world.
movies.title: Kung Fu Soccer

movies.overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.
movies.tagline: Fear can hold you prisoner. Hope can set you free.
movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption

movies.overview: Anahita, traumatised by the brutal disappearance of her mother, finds comfort in Shalini, her history teacher. On an unconventional school excursion to a mysterious prehistoric site, she confronts her terrifying destiny.
movies.title: Bokshi

movies.overview: On 1949 October 1, the day of the founding ceremony of the People's Republic of China, Xiao Dali enters the city and is reorganized as the director of the public security police station. He finds that primary school teacher Feng Jingbo is full of doubts. With the high vigilance of a soldier and the sense of responsibility of a public security official, Dali insists on partnering with Feng and becomes his neighbor. He then spends his whole life carrying out a nearly four-decade pursuit without regrets.
movies.title: I Know Who You Are

movies.overview: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.
movies.tagline: Mankind was born on Earth. It was never meant to die here.
movies.title: Interstellar

movies.overview: Olga is married to Laurent, who is devoted to his career and often leaves Olga at home alone when he travels away for work.  Whilst she is rich and wants for nothing, she is terribly bored with life.  When Laurent is working away she meets up with his colleague Pierre and through him meets Claude, who is unemployed and fed up of his situation.  Can Olga and Claude help each other to get their lives back on track?
movies.title: Melancoly Baby

movies.overview: It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.
movies.title: Heartstopper Forever

movies.overview: Unable to stand by and watch as countless refugees lose their lives attempting to reach Europe by sea, a group of young Berliners take action. Inexperienced but driven by passion and courage, they launch a crowdfunding campaign to buy an old ship. Venturing into the Mediterranean, they embark on a mission to save thousands of people. But their efforts soon put their understanding of law and justice to the test.
movies.title: 23 000 Lives

movies.overview: The life of a respected British politician at the height of his career crumbles when he becomes obsessed with his son's lover.
movies.title: Damage

movies.overview: Mércedès, an actress from Paris attempts to break off a difficult relationship with the jealous and possessive stalker Johnny. She meets newspaper writer Pierre and goes with him for an afternoon fling. Before the sweat even dries, she finds herself hopelessly in love with him. But soon after their affair begins, he is called off on a business trip leaving the suddenly distraught Mércedès alone. Though preparing for a new play, she is unable to concentrate and barely able to function. Mércedès quits the production, locks herself in Pierre's apartment and quietly begins falling apart, collapsing into a bleak, reclusive madness until his return.
movies.title: A Flame in My Heart

movies.overview: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.
movies.title: Maa Inti Bangaram

movies.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.
movies.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill

movies.overview: New city, new life, and an unexpected encounter with Luke-a boy fueled by adrenaline and haunted by demons. Despite the warnings, Hasley can't stay away. In their 'boulevard,' they find a raw, liberating love. But as his past threatens to destroy them both, Hasley faces a heartbreaking choice: can you save someone who isn't ready to be rescued?
movies.title: Boulevard

movies.overview: Thirty years ago, the Super Ying Association led by Superman Wang Changhai crushed the aliens. Years later, Wang Changhai was appointed to return to his hometown to set up a combat squad, but in the town of Rheinland, which had been peaceful for many years, human feelings and courtesies have left Wang Changhai overwhelmed, creating layers of obstacles to Wang's ability to complete his mission.
movies.title: Keep Real

movies.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.
movies.tagline: Witness the wedding of the year.
movies.title: The Drama

movies.overview: In a Canadian mountain resort, Vixen Palmer resides with her naive pilot husband Tom. While he's away flying in tourists, she sleeps with practically everybody including a husband and his wife, and even her biker brother. However, the only one she won't bed is her brother's friend... who is Black.
movies.title: Vixen!

movies.overview: A former Secret Service agent grudgingly takes an assignment to protect a pop idol who's threatened by a crazed fan. At first, the safety-obsessed bodyguard and the self-indulgent diva totally clash. But before long, all that tension sparks fireworks of another sort, and the love-averse tough guy is torn between duty and romance.
movies.tagline: Never let her out of your sight. Never let your guard down. Never fall in love.
movies.title: The Bodyguard

movies.overview: In a village that doesn't officially exist, a laborer's unmatched athletic talent becomes his weapon to fight for his people's right to be recognized.
movies.title: Peddi

movies.overview: Denise, an orphaned girl, moves to Paris where she hopes to find work at her uncle's store. But the glamorous department store 'Aux Bonheur des Dames' across the street crushes all the little businesses around. She finds a position there.
movies.title: Au Bonheur des Dames

movies.overview: The time is the mid-14th century --- the Pope is now residing at Avignon, the Black Death is killing millions across Europe, and civil wars are adding to the turmoil and chaos. In this story adapted from Giovanni Boccaccio's Decameron, a young teenage couple is sent to live in a nearby town by the man's uncle, in an attempt to keep them safe from harm. She is from the lower classes, and he comes from a noble family -- a family that opposes his choice of a future bride. While en route to the town, the couple's horses are stolen and they are forced to continue through the forest on foot -- at a pace that introduces them to a kaleidoscope of Boccaccio's characters, from masters of mysticism, to soldiers of the warring Papal armies. Somehow, the couple manage to get through this gauntlet of sorts, and they do marry. Just as they are ready to go back to Rome, they hear that there is an insurrection in the offing, and suddenly, their brief spate of stability is threatened again.
movies.title: Bosco d'amore

movies.overview: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of the most precious resource in existence - a commodity capable of unlocking humanity's greatest potential - only those who can conquer their fear will survive.
movies.title: Dune

movies.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

production_companies.name: iQIYI Pictures （重复 同 iQiyi Motion Pictures）

movies.tagline: He's training a new generation of law enforcers for a dangerous mission to save the world from ruthless criminals.
movies.title: The Shadow's Edge

movies.overview: A woman, who has been the mistress of a man who has just died, thinks about leaving the little Italian village where they lived and moving to another place. An old and rich man offers her a place in his house, however, she will have to listen to him telling his past love stories.
movies.title: The Sparrow's Fluttering

movies.overview: Two couples meet at a spa when they realize their respective suites share a bathroom.
movies.title: A Great Love

movies.original_title: ゴールデンカムイ 網走監獄襲撃編
movies.overview: As each group pursues their mission, a fierce battle unfolds over the tattooed prisoners. Who is friend, and who is foe? The fight leads them all to Abashiri Prison, where Noppera-bo, the man who holds all the answers, is locked away...
movies.title: Golden Kamuy -The Abashiri Prison Raid-

movies.overview: A true story of two men who should never have met – a quadriplegic aristocrat who was injured in a paragliding accident and a young man from the projects.
movies.tagline: Sometimes you have to reach into someone else's world to find out what's missing in your own.
movies.title: The Intouchables

movies.overview: A gripping story about a woman wagered in a high-stakes card game. But the stakes get even hotter when she’s won by the man who’s long been obsessed with her.
movies.title: Siping

movies.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
movies.tagline: Act like you own the place.
movies.title: Parasite

movies.original_title: Susana y Elvira: Sin plan B
movies.overview: Susana and Elvira, two former best friends, reunite after two years apart to organize the celebrity wedding of the year.
movies.tagline: Chick flicks ruined their lives. Now they're trapped in one.
movies.title: Susana and Elvira: No Plan B

movies.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.
movies.title: Oppenheimer

movies.overview: Triggered by the search for his missing aunt, human rights activist Jaswant Singh Khalra takes on a broken system in a courageous fight to uncover the conspiracy behind thousands of disappearances and extrajudicial killings during the nadir of Punjab’s period of insurgency.
movies.title: Satluj

movies.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.
movies.tagline: How do you hold onto true love after you've found it?
movies.title: Your Fault: London

movies.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.
movies.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures

movies.original_title: เลือดรักนักฆ่า
movies.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.
movies.title: My Dearest Assassin

movies.overview: VMX hottest star Aliya Raymundo teams up with sexy siren Anya Austria as two receptionists in a cheap motel. Their quiet routine heats up with the arrival of a mysterious regular guest who begins to stir tension, desire, and conflict in their fragile relationship.
movies.title: Check-In

movies.overview: Noah must leave her city, boyfriend, and friends to move into William Leister's mansion, the flashy and wealthy husband of her mother Rafaela. As a proud and independent 17 year old, Noah resists living in a mansion surrounded by luxury. However, it is there where she meets Nick, her new stepbrother, and the clash of their strong personalities becomes evident from the very beginning.
movies.tagline: Love can only survive in the shadow of secrets.
movies.title: My Fault

movies.overview: In the summer of 1939, 13-year-old Marie goes with her parents to visit her grandparents in a small town near Avignon. Marie discovers her femininity and falls for a young Jewish doctor, but he prefers Eva, Marie's mother.
movies.title: The Adolescent

movies.overview: A young man's dreams come true when the sexy new maid seduces him. But she has a secret that leads to trouble.
movies.title: Lola's Secret

movies.overview: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.
movies.title: The Invite

movies.overview: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.
movies.tagline: Love begins when you let it in.
movies.title: Girls Like Girls

movies.overview: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.
movies.title: Marty Supreme

movies.overview: A gallerist risks her family and flourishing career when she enters into an affair with a talented painter and slowly loses control of her life.
movies.title: Addicted

movies.overview: When 11-year-old Riley moves to a new city, her Emotions team up to help her through the transition. Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness work together, but when Joy and Sadness get lost, they must journey through unfamiliar places to get back home.
movies.tagline: Meet the little voices inside your head.
movies.title: Inside Out

movies.overview: A New York stockbroker refuses to cooperate in a large securities fraud case involving corruption on Wall Street, corporate banking world and mob infiltration. Based on Jordan Belfort's autobiography.
movies.title: The Wolf of Wall Street

movies.overview: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.
movies.tagline: It takes an awful lot to kill a person.
movies.title: Hunting Season

movies.overview: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City while becoming an infamous psychopathic crime figure.
movies.title: Joker

movies.overview: Two sisters embark on an epic quest for revenge, confronting a charged family history that pushes them to extraordinary lengths.
movies.tagline: Make your daddy dead. Real dead.
movies.title: Is God Is
